title: limonium × profusum
intro: Limonium × profusum, also known as statice, is a hybrid plant species in the Plumbaginaceae family, derived from the cross between Limonium sinuatum and Limonium purpureum. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Statice has been traditionally used to support the health benefits of the body, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Statice can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
